title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.300 - Congressman Gene Taylor Highway, Interstate Highway 44, designation as (Jasper County)
text:
227.300.  Congressman Gene Taylor Highway, Interstate Highway 44, designation as (Jasper County). — The portion of Interstate Highway 44 contained within a county of the first class having a population between ninety and one hundred thousand and bordering on the state of Kansas shall be designated as the "Congressman Gene Taylor Highway".
(L. 1996 H.B. 991 § 13)
